data.content: 7f74 planning complete. The existing Escalations screen is `src/components/final-cut-view.tsx`; it renders human-owned beats from the `requiresHumanAction=true` query. Implementation should add tabs there: existing beats view plus an Approvals tab backed by c30f approval-event plumbing. Do not create a parallel hidden store. Preserve old BeatTable behavior, add approval rows with beat/session/adapter/server/tool/message/params context and console links, and implement approve/deny/dismiss/manual-unsupported only where adapter response support is proven. Keep this blocked on c30f implementation for correctness.
